title: After the Debut: Bring the Brat

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Aghhh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (Oh, it's just so, so irritating! That was the real deal, and I couldn't concentrate at all!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(That was supposed to be my chance to find a
new spell! This is no fun at all! It's just really,
really annoying!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (I hate this!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Sweep Tosho is rather irritated.
The silent pressure seems to have gotten under
her skin.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! I'm sorry to bother you right after a
race, but may I have a word?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Don't speak for me! I can make my own decisions!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
My! Um... W-would it be better to interview you
another time?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: We can do it now. What's your question?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well, thank you very much. In that case, I'd
like to ask about your next goal.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...It's the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a junior G1 held at Hanshin Racecourse. It's
also a mile race, so it's well-suited to her.
choice_data_list: (...I wonder if she's already looked into it.)

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You're going straight for a G1?! You must really
be looking for a challenge...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Well, you are at that age when people start
wanting to showcase who they are. That said,
Sweep...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I believe this is your first interview, so I'm just
going to give you a little advice. Instead of
answering with one or two words, we'd appreciate
it if you could share a little more with us.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's cuter if you smile and speak more
cheerfully.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Who could that be at a time like this?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Father
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Sweepy! Make sure you get plenty of rest
today! Try and get used to going to bed even
when you want to—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep! Click...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Every single person has been telling me what to
do all day long!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I can't stand it! I'm not even gonna race anymore,
so just leave me alone!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Um... Sweep? It might be best for you to head
home...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going home! I'm not moving an inch from
this spot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She bolts herself to the spot, but after refusing to
budge for some time, her eyelids start to droop,
and she falls fast asleep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While grappling with the major issue of how to
interact with her going forward, I start to think
about her next goal.
choice_data_list: She did mention the Hanshin J.F.
She did mention the Hanshin J.F.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Since she brought it up herself, I decide to
make the Hanshin J.F. her next goal for now.
